subject: [PATCH v2 5/9] nfsd: gate nfs3 setacl by argp->mask

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch fixes an issue in the NFSv3 ACL implementation where set_posix_acl() was being called unconditionally, leading to incorrect behavior when setting or removing ACLs. The fix involves adding checks for the argp->mask bits before calling set_posix_acl(), ensuring that only the relevant ACLs are modified. This change mirrors the existing logic in nfsd3_proc_getacl().
